'''pavadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mgmt|mgmt]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mgmt|mgmt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pavadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pævædhæth|pævædhæth]] || [[word:pævædhæj|pævædhæj]] || [[word:pævædhæsh|pævædhæsh]] || [[word:pævædhæ|pævædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pavavadhath|pavavadhath]] || [[word:pavavadhaj|pavavadhaj]] || [[word:pavavadhash|pavavadhash]] || [[word:pavavadha|pavavadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pavadhath|pavadhath]] || [[word:pavadhaj|pavadhaj]] || [[word:pavadhash|pavadhash]] || [[word:pavadha|pavadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pavafdhafth|pavafdhafth]] || [[word:pavafdhafj|pavafdhafj]] || [[word:pavafdhafsh|pavafdhafsh]] || [[word:pavafdhaf|pavafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pavadhatha|pavadhatha]] || [[word:pavadhaja|pavadhaja]] || [[word:pavadhasha|pavadhasha]] || [[word:pavadhaka|pavadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pavadhath|pavadhath]] || [[word:pavadhaj|pavadhaj]] || [[word:pavadhash|pavadhash]] || [[word:pavadha|pavadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pavadhathal|pavadhathal]] || [[word:pavadhajal|pavadhajal]] || [[word:pavadhashal|pavadhashal]] || [[word:pavadhakal|pavadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pavadhaathatha|pavadhaathatha]] || [[word:pavadhaajaja|pavadhaajaja]] || [[word:pavadhaashasha|pavadhaashasha]] || [[word:pavadhaaka|pavadhaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pavadhathan|pavadhathan]] || [[word:pavadhajan|pavadhajan]] || [[word:pavadhashan|pavadhashan]] || [[word:pavadhakan|pavadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pavadhathaoro|pavadhathaoro]] || [[word:pavadhajaoro|pavadhajaoro]] || [[word:pavadhashaoro|pavadhashaoro]] || [[word:pavadhakaoro|pavadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|34122d8}}
